title: Decision
description: Phase 3 synthesis: the chair's final, recordable decision.

rationale.description: Why this option won, grounded in the panel's reasoning and the context pack.

why.description: Why this option was not chosen.

dissent.description: Minority report: unresolved objections and low-confidence positions worth recording. Mandatory if any member ended below moderate confidence or kept an unaddressed objection.

provisional.description: True if the meeting hit maxRounds without convergence; the decision stands but tensions remain unresolved.

followUps.description: Next actions, spikes, or revisit triggers.
